title: diphasium tristachyum
intro: Diphasium tristachyum, also known as Black-leaved Forked Fern, is a species of fern in the family Diellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diphasium tristachyum include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat infections and promote overall well-being.
